inputs.label: Recall 1
inputs.businessContext: First recall value (must be the smallest, in ascending order)

businessContext_i18n.en: First recall value (must be the smallest, in ascending order)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk geri çağırma değeri (en küçük, artan sırada olmalıdır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Erster Recall-Wert (muss der kleinste sein, aufsteigend)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Première valeur de rappel (doit être la plus petite, en ordre croissant)
businessContext_i18n.es: Primer valor de recall (debe ser el más pequeño, en orden ascendente)

inputs.label: Recall 2
inputs.businessContext: Second recall value (greater than or equal to Recall 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Second recall value (greater than or equal to Recall 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci geri çağırma değeri (Geri Çağırma 1'den büyük veya eşit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Deuxième valeur de rappel (supérieure ou égale au Rappel 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Segundo valor de recall (mayor o igual que Recall 1)

inputs.label: Recall 3
inputs.businessContext: Third recall value (greater than or equal to Recall 2)

businessContext_i18n.en: Third recall value (greater than or equal to Recall 2)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü geri çağırma değeri (Geri Çağırma 2'den büyük veya eşit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Troisième valeur de rappel (supérieure ou égale au Rappel 2)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tercer valor de recall (mayor o igual que Recall 2)

inputs.label: Recall 4
inputs.businessContext: Fourth recall value (the largest, equal to or greater than Recall 3, typically 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fourth recall value (the largest, equal to or greater than Recall 3, typically 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dördüncü geri çağırma değeri (en büyük, Geri Çağırma 3'e eşit veya büyük, genellikle 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Vierter Recall-Wert (der größte, gleich oder größer als Recall 3, typischerweise 1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quatrième valeur de rappel (la plus grande, égale ou supérieure au Rappel 3, généralement 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuarto valor de recall (el más grande, igual o mayor que Recall 3, normalmente 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
